testcase.name: should initialize with default options
should initialize with custom options
should create MemoryStore instance
should create SkillLoader instance
should create EventStream instance
should set autoEvolve to false when explicitly passed false
should set autoEvolve to true by default
should set verbose to true when passed
should start the engine successfully
should call initialize
should start heartbeat when autoEvolve is true
should not start heartbeat when autoEvolve is false
should create required directories
should call memory.initialize()
should call skillLoader.loadAllSkills()
should push engine_start event to eventStream
should create a session with correct properties
should return result when task is done
should continue looping until done
should push events to eventStream during execution
should throw error and push error event
should store session even when error occurs
should update context between iterations
should respect maxOuterTurns limit
should find relevant skills
should execute each relevant skill
should push skill execution events
should handle skill execution errors
should return aggregated results
should log verbose output when enabled
should return done false when no skills mark done
should return done true when any skill marks done
should combine outputs from successful skills
should merge contexts from successful skills
should handle mixed success and failure results
should handle empty results
should filter out undefined outputs
should set up heartbeat timer
should execute beat immediately
should execute beat on interval
should push heartbeat events
should handle heartbeat errors
should call reflection skill if available
should call evolve skill if available
should call memory cleanup
should not fail when skills are not available
should set isRunning to false
should clear heartbeat timer
should save event stream
should handle stop when heartbeatTimer is null
should generate unique session IDs
should start with session_ prefix
should contain timestamp
should set memoryDir correctly
should set sessionsFile correctly
should create memory directory
should append session to JSONL file
should store timestamp with session
should store each session on new line
should return empty array when file does not exist
should return matching sessions
should respect limit parameter
should handle parse errors gracefully
should handle non-ENOENT errors
should return true for matching tasks
should return false for non-matching tasks
should be case-insensitive
should handle missing task
should not throw when called
should log session storage when verbose is true
should set stigmergyDir correctly
should set skillsDir correctly
should initialize empty skills Map
should set verbose from options
should call loadBuiltinSkills and loadUserSkills
should try to load builtin skills
should handle missing user skills directory
should load JS files from user skills directory
should handle errors from readdir
should skip if skill file does not exist
should handle skill loading errors
should log error message when skill loading fails
should log debug info when verbose is true
should log debug info when DEBUG env is set
should return skills that can handle the task
should exclude skills that cannot handle the task
should return empty array when no skills loaded
should return skill by name
should return undefined for unknown skill
should initialize with empty events array
should initialize with empty listeners Map
should add event to events array
should add id to event
should add timestamp if not provided
should preserve provided timestamp
should notify listeners
should generate unique IDs
should start with evt_ prefix
should add listener for event type
should support multiple listeners for same event type
should call all listeners for event type
should not fail when no listeners for event type
should handle listener errors
should create output directory
should write events to file
should handle empty events array
should execute complete agent loop workflow
should handle multiple skills in sequence
should properly chain events through the system

testcase.classname: SoulEngine Advanced Tests › Loop limit edge cases
testcase.name: should complete with undefined result when maxOuterTurns reached without done

testcase.classname: SoulEngine Advanced Tests › Loop limit edge cases
testcase.name: should complete with undefined result when maxInnerTurns reached per outer loop

testcase.classname: SoulEngine Advanced Tests › Loop limit edge cases
testcase.name: should handle zero maxOuterTurns by not executing inner loop

testcase.classname: SoulEngine Advanced Tests › Loop limit edge cases
testcase.name: should handle zero maxInnerTurns by not executing skills

testcase.classname: SoulEngine Advanced Tests › Start/Stop lifecycle edge cases
testcase.name: should handle double start

testcase.classname: SoulEngine Advanced Tests › Start/Stop lifecycle edge cases
testcase.name: should handle double stop gracefully

testcase.classname: SoulEngine Advanced Tests › Start/Stop lifecycle edge cases
testcase.name: should handle stop without start

testcase.name: should handle null context

testcase.classname: SoulEngine Advanced Tests › Context propagation edge cases
testcase.name: should handle undefined context

testcase.classname: SoulEngine Advanced Tests › Context propagation edge cases
testcase.name: should merge nested context updates

testcase.classname: SoulEngine Advanced Tests › Error recovery scenarios
testcase.name: should handle file system errors during initialization

testcase.classname: SoulEngine Advanced Tests › Error recovery scenarios
testcase.name: should handle event stream save errors during stop

testcase.classname: MemoryStore Advanced Tests › JSONL format edge cases
testcase.name: should handle sessions with special characters

testcase.classname: MemoryStore Advanced Tests › JSONL format edge cases
testcase.name: should handle sessions with circular reference safely

testcase.classname: MemoryStore Advanced Tests › JSONL format edge cases
testcase.name: should handle sessions with undefined values

testcase.classname: MemoryStore Advanced Tests › JSONL format edge cases
testcase.name: should handle very large sessions

testcase.name: should handle empty file

testcase.classname: MemoryStore Advanced Tests › RetrieveMemories edge cases
testcase.name: should handle file with only whitespace

testcase.name: should handle file with mixed valid and invalid JSON lines

testcase.classname: MemoryStore Advanced Tests › RetrieveMemories edge cases
testcase.name: should search case-insensitively

testcase.name: should handle query with special regex characters

testcase.name: should handle empty query

testcase.classname: MemoryStore Advanced Tests › isRelevance edge cases
testcase.name: should handle null task gracefully

testcase.name: should handle empty skills directory

testcase.name: should handle canHandle throwing error

testcase.classname: SkillLoader Advanced Tests › Built-in skill paths
testcase.name: should attempt to load all expected builtin skills

testcase.classname: EventStream Advanced Tests › Event accumulation edge cases
testcase.name: should handle rapid event pushes

testcase.classname: EventStream Advanced Tests › Event accumulation edge cases
testcase.name: should maintain event order

testcase.classname: EventStream Advanced Tests › Event accumulation edge cases
testcase.name: should handle events with complex data
should handle multiple event types with different listeners
should not stop other listeners when one throws
should handle listeners added dynamically

testcase.name: should generate unique filenames

testcase.name: should handle events without id or timestamp

testcase.classname: EventStream Advanced Tests › Save edge cases
testcase.name: should create valid JSONL format

testcase.name: should handle memory store failure during session save

testcase.name: should handle skill execution returning invalid result gracefully

testcase.name: should handle concurrent event pushes

should match session structure snapshot

testcase.name: should handle non-string task gracefully

testcase.classname: SoulEngine Type Safety Tests › Invalid input handling
testcase.name: should handle non-object context gracefully
should not leak memory with many sessions
should not accumulate events indefinitely in memory
should initialize cache as a Map
should use default cacheMaxSize
should accept custom cacheMaxSize from options

testcase.name: should add session to cache when stored

testcase.name: should store timestamp with cache entry

testcase.classname: MemoryStore Cache Tests › LRU cache eviction
testcase.name: should evict oldest entry when cache exceeds maxSize

testcase.name: should maintain cache size at cacheMaxSize after multiple evictions

testcase.classname: MemoryStore Cache Tests › LRU cache eviction
testcase.name: should evict in FIFO order for entries added at same time

testcase.name: should check cache before reading file

testcase.name: should respect limit when retrieving from cache

testcase.name: should fall back to file when cache miss

testcase.classname: MemoryStore Cache Tests › Cache-first retrieval in retrieveMemories
testcase.name: should return early from cache when limit reached
should remove old entries from cache during cleanup

testcase.name: should throw when evolution skill fails (no error handling in runEvolutionTasks)

testcase.name: should handle evolution errors when called via heartbeat

testcase.classname: SoulEngine Heartbeat and Evolution Edge Cases › Evolution task execution with real skill behavior
testcase.name: should execute skills in correct order during evolution
should create properly formatted JSONL file
should generate filenames with timestamp pattern
should handle session with complex nested events
should handle session with context from skill execution
should handle multiple rapid session stores
should handle skill with async canHandle method
should handle skill returning Promise that resolves to result
